caption: A video segment features a large metal bowl filled with popcorn, some of which is white and some of which is tinged with green and yellow. A hand enters from the top left, stirring and moving the popcorn. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a circular inset shows a woman with short blonde hair wearing a dark blue shirt, who appears to be speaking. Each frame displays the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" in the upper left corner, accompanied by a logo. Across the sequence, the hand continues to shift the colored popcorn around the bowl, altering the distribution of the white, green, and yellow pieces. The background consists of a soft-focus blue sky with white clouds, which serves as a backdrop for the overall presentation.
